Params: {2: 'Moineau', 3: 'You know that\'s not what I mean.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Moineau', 3: 'She looks way too much like you...', 4: '2'}
{3: 'Moineau shakes her head, letting the subject die in the heavy silence.'}
{2: 'Forensic Investigator', 3: 'Based on our preliminary examination, the estimated time of death is between 7:30 PM and 7:50 PM.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Forensic Investigator', 3: 'The victim sustained multiple wounds, several showing signs of field treatment. The technique suggests self-administered care.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Forensic Investigator', 3: 'The fatal injury is a single, clean puncture from back to front, piercing the core. A precise and efficient strike.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Forensic Investigator', 3: 'This wound is distinct from the others. Here, both her bionic dermis and internal mechanics show thermal degradation.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 3: 'The forensic investigator passes over a photograph.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Forensic Investigator', 3: 'This indicates the weapon had either a high-temperature blade or an energy edge.', 4: '18'}
{2: 'Forensic Investigator', 3: 'The remaining wounds are consistent with an attack from this mechanoid.', 4: '18'}
{3: 'She points to the mechanoid remains on the floor.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Forensic Investigator', 3: 'These are projectile impacts, and these are lacerations from its integrated blade.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Moineau', 3: 'Mechanoids are supposed to be non-hostile. The Elysium Mechanical Production Act mandates prime directives against harming humans.', 4: '18'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Teddy steps forward and kneels before Christina. The forensic investigator\'s report fades into indistinct noise.'}
{3: 'Christina\'s lifeless eyes stare back, her face a mirror of Teddy\'s own.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'For a moment, Teddy feels as if she is the one lying on the floor.'}
{3: 'A coldness floods her body, her core no longer generating heat. With vital fluid draining from her frame, her vision blurs, doubles, then slowly dissolves into darkness.'}

{3: 'She is trapped here, unable to move. She witnesses it all: patrol officers knocking, breaching the door, and establishing a perimeter with police tape. She feels the forensic investigator inspecting her wounds, taking photographs.'}
{1: '1', 3: '"<phonetic=Christina>I</phonetic>" wait here quietly for "<phonetic=me>Christina</phonetic>" to come.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'An overwhelming sense of absurdity floods her. For an infinitesimal moment, the entire world feels like a fabrication.'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'That joke is in seriously poor taste, Moineau.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Moineau points behind Teddy. Only then does she notice the teddy bear sitting on the table behind her.'}
{3: 'Teddy steps forward, picking up the stuffed bear to examine it.'}
{2: '???', 3: 'Fine, fine, you win. It\'s not that bad.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Did you check the building\'s surveillance? The time of death was recent. The killer can\'t have gone far. The latest footage should show something.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Moineau', 3: 'I did a quick review. No anomalies.', 4: '2'}

{2: 'Moineau', 3: 'It\'s a "Guardian III". A civilian-grade auto security unit manufactured by Rokubishi Electric. They\'re usually bought in bulk by corporations. Supposedly armed with non-lethal deterrents only.', 4: '2'}
{3: 'She repeats Moineau\'s words with dripping sarcasm.'}
{2: 'Moineau', 3: 'Two possibilities. One, someone rewrote its core directives, and it would take a real expert to manage that.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Moineau', 3: 'The second is a fundamental design flaw that made it malfunction and attack autonomously.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Judging by the scene, there was more than one mechanoid here.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Teddy surveys the chaotic disarray of the apartment.'}
{3: 'As she responds to Teddy, Moineau connects her hacking module to Christina\'s computer.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Moineau', 3: 'I\'ll access her terminal and see if I can find any leads.', 4: '18'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Teddy knocks on the door of apartment 704. It\'s opened by a man whose expression is a landscape of deep trouble.'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Hello, I\'m Inspector Teddy, Elysium Crime Investigation Bureau, badge number ED08. I have some questions about the incident.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'You\'re the one who called it in, correct?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Can you describe exactly what you heard?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Allen Blake', 3: 'Well... I was eating when I heard someone fighting next door. At first, I thought it was an action movie.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Allen Blake', 3: 'But then the walls shook. That\'s when I knew it was a real fight. I was too scared to do anything...', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Do you recall the exact time this happened?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Allen Blake', 3: 'I checked the clock. It\'s stuck in my head. 7:28 PM.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Allen Blake', 3: 'Then I heard glass breaking, so I looked out...', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Allen Blake', 3: 'There was... this thing. A shadow like a monster, glowing red, then it just vanished. I thought I was seeing things.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Allen Blake', 3: 'After that, everything went quiet. That was around 7:35.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Our log shows your call came in at 8:12. You waited quite a while. Can you explain the delay?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Allen Blake', 3: '...I didn\'t want any trouble. I wasn\'t going to call at all, but that... thing...', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Allen Blake', 3: 'I couldn\'t get that shadow out of my head. The more I thought about it, the more it terrified me, so I finally called.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Hello, I\'m Inspector Teddy, Elysium Crime Investigation Bureau, badge number ED08. I have some questions about the incident.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Tall Resident', 3: 'Wait, did someone die? Then I\'m definitely using this to get my rent lowered!'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Tired Resident', 3: 'Didn\'t hear a thing... Don\'t know anything...', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Male Voice', 3: 'Get back in here and make my damn dinner!'}
{3: 'A man\'s voice calls from inside the apartment.'}
{2: 'Tired Resident', 3: 'Shut up, you worthless piece of trash!', 4: '2'}
{3: 'As a cup explodes against the floor inside the apartment, the tired woman\'s veins bulge like cords across her forehead.'}
{2: 'Male Voice', 3: 'This time I won\'t hold back!'}
{2: 'Tired Resident', 3: 'You couldn\'t take me on your best day!', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Male Voice', 3: 'I never should have married you!'}
{2: 'Tired Resident', 3: 'Sorry. As you can see, I\'m about to be a little preoccupied.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Tired Resident', 3: 'I didn\'t hear anything because I was busy trading blows with him.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Scrawny Resident', 3: 'Not really. Didn\'t even catch her name.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Scrawny Resident', 3: 'My own schedule\'s a mess because of work.', 4: '2'}
{3: 'He gestures toward the livestreaming equipment in his room.'}
{2: 'Scrawny Resident', 3: 'I\'m a streamer. You know how it is. Once did a 43-hour marathon.', 4: '2'}

{2: 'Scrawny Resident', 3: 'Anyway... Point is, a few times when I went out for food in the early morning, I\'d run into her in the hall. Sometimes heading out, sometimes coming back. Always looked... guarded.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Scrawny Resident', 3: 'Oh... right. I think she was going to the docks.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Scrawny Resident', 3: 'I\'m sensitive to smells. Allergies, you know. Once, in the elevator, I caught the distinct scent of the sea on her. The specific kind you only get at the docks.', 4: '2'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Paranoid Resident', 3: 'She must have uncovered the truth about this world. It was suicide!', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Paranoid Resident', 3: 'Listen, this world isn\'t real! We were all abducted by the Mi-Go Yeti from the Centaurus constellation!', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Paranoid Resident', 3: 'Those fungal crabs are disguising themselves as humans, living among us!', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Paranoid Resident', 3: 'We\'re all just brains in jars!', 4: '2'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Teddy rubs her temples in frustration, heading back into Apartment 703.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Teddy', 3: 'And we\'re all just brains in jars being experimented on by Mi-Go Yeti.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Oh, and these Yeti? They\'re apparently fungal crab-things.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Putting the cosmic horror aside, the victim kept irregular hours, went out frequently, and had ties to the docks.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Moineau gestures for Teddy to come over to the computer.'}
{1: '2', 2: '<size=40>Dear Ms. AAABear, your storage unit rental agreement is due to expire on the 30th of this month.</size>', 3: '1200', 4: '150', 10: '1', 13: '4'}

{1: '3', 2: '<size=40>If you wish to continue using our storage facilities, please renew your subscription and settle the corresponding fees before the expiration date.</size>', 3: '1200', 4: '50', 10: '1', 13: '4'}

{1: '4', 2: '<size=40>If you decide to discontinue our service, please ensure all belongings are cleared from the unit by the expiration date and reply "CANCEL" to this message to unsubscribe.</size>', 3: '1200', 4: '-50', 10: '1', 13: '4'}

{2: '"[Public Stowage] Dear Ms. AAABear, your storage unit rental agreement is due to expire on the 30th of this month. If you wish to continue using our storage facilities, please renew your subscription and settle the corresponding fees before the expiration date. If you decide to discontinue our service, please ensure all belongings are cleared from the unit by the expiration date and reply \'CANCEL\' to this message to unsubscribe."'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Moineau', 3: 'She renewed it. The facility is close to the docks.', 4: '18'}
{3: 'The vast, three-story building seems to stretch on forever.'}
{3: 'After questioning the facility manager, they learned that Christina\'s unit—registered under the name AAABear—is tucked away in a corner of the first floor.'}
{3: 'Moineau steps forward. She slides the manager\'s spare key into the lock and, with a sharp pull, hauls the rattling door up on its tracks.'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Maybe that\'s precisely why Christina chose it. No digital trail.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'The storage unit yawns open, revealing the owner\'s private space. Dominating the wall is a long table, with a cork bulletin board hanging above.'}
{3: 'The board is plastered with photographs of Elysium\'s buildings, all connected by an intricate web of red and yellow threads.'}
{3: 'At the web\'s center is a picture of the central building.'}
{3: 'A sticky note beside it poses a single, cryptic question: "Real or fake?"'}
{3: 'On the table below, a data chip rests amid other scattered items.'}
{3: 'Apparently, the unit also serves as a sparse living quarters, furnished with a folding bed and refrigerator.'}
{3: 'While the floor is a jumble of surveying and excavation tools: a spirit level, an inclinometer, a shovel, a pickaxe, a hammer, and a small handheld drill.'}
{3: 'Teddy inserts the chip into her terminal. Instantly, a holographic interface materializes in the air.'}
{3: 'Various statistical data about Elysium appears, methodically arranged and categorized.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Teddy', 3: 'City water supply stats... population census data... public transport operational costs...', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Distracted from her examination of the tools, Moineau\'s head snaps up, her face etched with puzzlement.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Moineau', 3: 'Why was she collecting all this data?', 4: '18'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Your guess is as good as mine.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Teddy murmurs, her attention clearly elsewhere. Her gaze cuts through the holographic data, fixing on the sticky note at the center of the evidence board.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Moineau', 3: 'There\'s a hidden passage under this refrigerator.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Moineau shoves the refrigerator aside, pulls back the carpet, and reveals a hinged metal trapdoor beneath.'}
